item.title: Installing a magnetic scale on a big lathe
item.description: Precision meets power as a magnetic scale is added to a massive lathe. How does this upgrade change performance?

media:content.media:title: Installing a magnetic scale on a big lathe
media:content.media:description: Precision meets power as a magnetic scale is added to a massive lathe. How does this upgrade change performance?

item.title: Drilling and tapping hard lathe chuck jaws
item.description: Precision matters when you are working with hardened lathe chuck jaws and this video walks through the drilling and tapping process with exactly the level of detail serious machinists appreciate. A great watch for anyone who values getting the job done right the first time. What is the most challenging material you have ever had to drill and tap?

media:content.media:title: Drilling and tapping hard lathe chuck jaws
media:content.media:description: Precision matters when you are working with hardened lathe chuck jaws and this video walks through the drilling and tapping process with exactly the level of detail serious machinists appreciate. A great watch for anyone who values getting the job done right the first time. What is the most challenging material you have ever had to drill and tap?

item.title: Replacing Pistons on a Hitachi Zaxis 670
item.description: Cutting Edge Engineering Australia A deep dive into the detailed process of replacing pistons on a Hitachi Zaxis 670, showing every step it takes to get this heavy machine back to full working condition. A must watch for anyone in the equipment repair or heavy machinery field. Have you ever tackled a piston replacement on a machine this size? the piston replacement process on a Hitachi Zaxis 670 excavator.

media:content.media:title: Replacing Pistons on a Hitachi Zaxis 670
media:content.media:description: Cutting Edge Engineering Australia A deep dive into the detailed process of replacing pistons on a Hitachi Zaxis 670, showing every step it takes to get this heavy machine back to full working condition. A must watch for anyone in the equipment repair or heavy machinery field. Have you ever tackled a piston replacement on a machine this size? the piston replacement process on a Hitachi Zaxis 670 excavator.

item.title: New RapidBlast SD140 Dustless Blaster
item.description: Unveiling the RapidBlast SD140, a powerful dustless blaster designed for cleaner, tougher jobs. How does this machine change the game in surface preparation?

media:content.media:title: New RapidBlast SD140 Dustless Blaster
media:content.media:description: Unveiling the RapidBlast SD140, a powerful dustless blaster designed for cleaner, tougher jobs. How does this machine change the game in surface preparation?

item.title: Building a Large Hex Socket
item.description: When standard tools won’t cut it, a custom hex socket is built from scratch. What machining techniques make this oversized tool fit perfectly under pressure?

media:content.media:title: Building a Large Hex Socket
media:content.media:description: When standard tools won’t cut it, a custom hex socket is built from scratch. What machining techniques make this oversized tool fit perfectly under pressure?

item.title: Hydraulic Cylinder Eye Replacement on CAT D9
item.description: The CAT D9 bulldozer depends on its hydraulic cylinder, and a worn eye demanded replacement. How do machinists ensure the new part can handle extreme force?

media:content.media:title: Hydraulic Cylinder Eye Replacement on CAT D9
media:content.media:description: The CAT D9 bulldozer depends on its hydraulic cylinder, and a worn eye demanded replacement. How do machinists ensure the new part can handle extreme force?

item.title: Cylinder rod repair
item.description: Heavy wear left this cylinder rod in rough shape, but skilled machining brings it back to spec. What steps make the repair strong enough to last?

media:content.media:title: Cylinder rod repair
media:content.media:description: Heavy wear left this cylinder rod in rough shape, but skilled machining brings it back to spec. What steps make the repair strong enough to last?

item.title: Broken Tailstock Repair
item.description: A damaged tailstock gets a second life through precision machining and expert repair. How do engineers restore accuracy to such a critical lathe component?

media:content.media:title: Broken Tailstock Repair
media:content.media:description: A damaged tailstock gets a second life through precision machining and expert repair. How do engineers restore accuracy to such a critical lathe component?

item.title: Using a Flame Spray
item.description: Flame spray technology breathes new life into worn parts, restoring strength and durability. This specialized process shows how advanced repair methods keep machinery running at its best. How does flame spray transform damaged components back to spec?

media:content.media:title: Using a Flame Spray
media:content.media:description: Flame spray technology breathes new life into worn parts, restoring strength and durability. This specialized process shows how advanced repair methods keep machinery running at its best. How does flame spray transform damaged components back to spec?
